info.name: Dust Conversations API
info.description:
Create and drive multi-turn conversations with Dust agents — post messages, stream events, manage content fragments, gather feedback, and resolve mentions.

Contact Support:
 Name: Dust Support

item.name: Download a Conversation-Scoped File by Path

variable.description:
(Required) Conversation-scoped file path, e.g. `conversation/foo.pdf` or
`conversation/subdir/foo.pdf`. The `conversation/` prefix is required; any other
scope prefix is rejected. Path traversal segments (`..`) are rejected.

request.description:
Download a file from a conversation's file system by its scoped path. The path must
be conversation-scoped, i.e. start with `conversation/` (as surfaced by agent file
system tools). The file content is streamed directly from the conversation mount.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Missing or invalid path parameters (e.g. missing or wrong scope prefix).

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Resolved path is outside the conversation scope.

item.name: Get Mention Suggestions for a Conversation

query.description: (Required) Search query string to filter suggestions
Array of mention types to include. Can be "agents", "users", or both. If not provided, defaults to agents and users.

item.name: Submit Feedback for a Specific Message in a Conversation

request.description:
Submit user feedback (thumbs up/down) for a specific message in a conversation.
Requires authentication and update:conversation scope.
